entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Major constraints in commercial crop production

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: Commercial production of agricultural crops

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: Variation in genetic makeup used to manage diseases in varieties

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding technique using molecular markers to produce varieties with good yields

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity or amount of crop produced

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or resist disease

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technique for determining the complete DNA sequence of an organism

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Technique for making precise changes to the DNA to improve inadequate traits

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Multicellular eukaryotes that produce antimicrobial secondary metabolites

entities.name: ANTIMICROBIAL SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Compounds produced by plants to reinforce cell walls and contain pathogens

entities.name: SECONDARY CELL WALLS
entities.description: Plant cell structures reinforced by metabolites to contain pathogens

entities.name: PATHOGEN
entities.description: Disease-causing agent that invades plant tissues

entities.name: CONSTITUTIVE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance metabolites or structures that are always present in the plant

entities.name: INDUCED RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance metabolites or structures produced following pathogen invasion

entities.name: BIOSYNTHETIC R GENES
entities.description: Genes that control the production of resistance metabolites

entities.name: R GENES
entities.description: Genes that regulate the hierarchy of biosynthetic R genes

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms that can cause mutations in R genes

entities.name: INDELS
entities.description: Insertions or deletions that can cause mutations in R genes

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: Biological pathways involving genes that can be edited to increase resistance

entities.name: MULTIPLE PATHOGEN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist multiple types of pathogens under field conditions
